top.title: Nato says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
top.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

top.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
top.summary: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

top.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
top.summary: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

top.title: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
top.summary: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.

top.title: Biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
top.summary: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.

top.title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
top.summary: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

title.#text: BMW is one step closer to selling you a color-changing car
Google’s handsome Pixel Watch 4 is on sale for $40 off in both size configurations
The RAM shortage could get even worse if Samsung labor protests cut production
